Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}Yeah, he's not keeping his usual pace.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}He thinks he'll make it to the nationals like that?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}If you guys have nothing better to do, then why don't you give me a hand with the laundry?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}The only thing they're good at is kicking up dirt...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Hey, Kaz! Coach wants to see you in the office![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}...Ah, never mind. I think we can wrap up practice for today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I started on my way back[n]to the dorm after practice.[n]{f 1 1}
